task: Fix r3a-exec-log GitHub sync conflicts and push reliability
root_causes: GitHub Actions committed analysis/latest_round_analysis.* after local agent commits
fixes: Workflow no longer commits generated analysis back to main
Workflow uploads analysis as artifact and job summary only
Added sync policy documenting single-writer rule for latest files
Added local sync script with fetch/rebase/push/remote-head verification and retries
Parent workspace local exclude now ignores r3a-exec-log/
recommended_next_decision: Use tools/sync_r3a_exec_log.ps1 for future pushes; Actions must not commit latest analysis files.
